summary: Reconciled Transaction Mapping state so verified product completion and persistence remain the source of truth while Approval Hierarchy stays documented as an automation caveat.
derived_updates: Restored runtime files to a merged state that keeps completed product truth and records the automation caveat separately.
Added run-reconciliation guidance to memory and recurring patterns so weaker reruns do not overwrite stronger verified evidence.
Added guardrails to Explorer, orchestration, and workspace rules to prevent evidence downgrades without reconciliation.
